markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss design and content strategy for new model comparison pages on Galileo's website.](https://fathom.video/share/xQxxt4DuSBYbYNrtyCynSfFh_miuyfcq?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Leverage Jeffrey's existing leaderboard redesign as a foundation for individual model pages](https://fathom.video/share/xQxxt4DuSBYbYNrtyCynSfFh_miuyfcq?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Prioritize interactive elements and data visualization over heavy copy](https://fathom.video/share/xQxxt4DuSBYbYNrtyCynSfFh_miuyfcq?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [Aim for real-time data updates where possible; weekly updates at minimum](https://fathom.video/share/xQxxt4DuSBYbYNrtyCynSfFh_miuyfcq?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Create three page types: overview hub, individual model pages, and comparison pages](https://fathom.video/share/xQxxt4DuSBYbYNrtyCynSfFh_miuyfcq?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)

## Topics

### Page Structure and Design

  - [Overview hub page similar to Ramp's landing page](https://fathom.video/share/xQxxt4DuSBYbYNrtyCynSfFh_miuyfcq?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Individual model pages based on Jeffrey's leaderboard redesign](https://fathom.video/share/xQxxt4DuSBYbYNrtyCynSfFh_miuyfcq?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Comparison pages for model-vs-model analysis](https://fathom.video/share/xQxxt4DuSBYbYNrtyCynSfFh_miuyfcq?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
  - [Header/subheader with visual element and dynamic model card](https://fathom.video/share/xQxxt4DuSBYbYNrtyCynSfFh_miuyfcq?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Include "Last Updated" date in header area](https://fathom.video/share/xQxxt4DuSBYbYNrtyCynSfFh_miuyfcq?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Focus on interactive elements and graphs over lengthy copy](https://fathom.video/share/xQxxt4DuSBYbYNrtyCynSfFh_miuyfcq?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)

### Data Management and Updates

  - [Ideal: Real-time data updates](https://fathom.video/share/xQxxt4DuSBYbYNrtyCynSfFh_miuyfcq?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Minimum: Weekly updates](https://fathom.video/share/xQxxt4DuSBYbYNrtyCynSfFh_miuyfcq?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Include "Last Updated" and "Next Update" notices for user expectations](https://fathom.video/share/xQxxt4DuSBYbYNrtyCynSfFh_miuyfcq?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [Explore options for automating data pulls from Hugging Face](https://fathom.video/share/xQxxt4DuSBYbYNrtyCynSfFh_miuyfcq?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Treat pages as product pages rather than SEO blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/xQxxt4DuSBYbYNrtyCynSfFh_miuyfcq?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [Use briefer copy with more interactive elements](https://fathom.video/share/xQxxt4DuSBYbYNrtyCynSfFh_miuyfcq?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [Link to these pages from blog posts for SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/xQxxt4DuSBYbYNrtyCynSfFh_miuyfcq?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [Reuse leaderboard data for individual model pages](https://fathom.video/share/xQxxt4DuSBYbYNrtyCynSfFh_miuyfcq?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [Comparison pages will require data from two models](https://fathom.video/share/xQxxt4DuSBYbYNrtyCynSfFh_miuyfcq?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)

### Design and Development Process

  - [GrowthX team to handle content population based on provided templates](https://fathom.video/share/xQxxt4DuSBYbYNrtyCynSfFh_miuyfcq?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)
  - [Jeffrey to focus on design aspects](https://fathom.video/share/xQxxt4DuSBYbYNrtyCynSfFh_miuyfcq?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [Jackson and Jeffrey to determine which leaderboard segments to include on overview page](https://fathom.video/share/xQxxt4DuSBYbYNrtyCynSfFh_miuyfcq?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [Simplify data presentation by removing complex sorting/filtering on individual model pages](https://fathom.video/share/xQxxt4DuSBYbYNrtyCynSfFh_miuyfcq?tab=summary&timestamp=1256.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jeffrey to complete SEM landing pages this week](https://fathom.video/share/xQxxt4DuSBYbYNrtyCynSfFh_miuyfcq?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Jeffrey to provide individual model page wireframe to GrowthX team by early/mid next week (target: August 11-12)](https://fathom.video/share/xQxxt4DuSBYbYNrtyCynSfFh_miuyfcq?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Jackson to create Shortcut ticket with compiled meeting notes and assign to Jeffrey](https://fathom.video/share/xQxxt4DuSBYbYNrtyCynSfFh_miuyfcq?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)
  - [GrowthX team to start content population once wireframes are received](https://fathom.video/share/xQxxt4DuSBYbYNrtyCynSfFh_miuyfcq?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [Team to rebuild pages in Framer after finalizing designs](https://fathom.video/share/xQxxt4DuSBYbYNrtyCynSfFh_miuyfcq?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
  - [Utilize GrowthX Slack channel for ongoing communication and questions](https://fathom.video/share/xQxxt4DuSBYbYNrtyCynSfFh_miuyfcq?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
